innovation_1.name: 类MRI角度频率分析机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that complex depth signals can be effectively decoupled and understood using an MRI-like angular frequency analysis mechanism.

innovation_2.name: 统一双掩码物理建模与反向波矢解析
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a unified dual-mask physical modeling approach combined with reverse wave-vector parsing to explicitly resolve these frequency interactions.

innovation_3.name: 分量感知自适应深度估计融合策略
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the superior performance of our component-aware adaptive fusion strategy in translating these parsed physical components into highly accurate depth maps.
